name: Tomato Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate beef slices for 30 minutes.
2. Heat wok with 2 Tbsp oil and garlic for 30 seconds, add beef, cook for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, remove and drain oil. Set aside.
3. Heat wok, high, add tomato wedges and stir for 2 minutes, then add sauce mixture. Thicken if too watery.
4. Return beef and stir well and serve hot.
5. Serve immediately.
